input.sql: ALTER TABLE t_account_bak ADD COLUMN id INT NOT NULL, ADD COLUMN password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''

output.sql: ALTER TABLE `encrypt_ds`.t_account_bak ADD COLUMN id INT NOT NULL, ADD COLUMN cipher_password VARCHAR(510) NOT NULL, ADD COLUMN assisted_query_password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, ADD COLUMN like_query_password VARCHAR(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 NOT NULL, ADD COLUMN plain_password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''

input.sql: ALTER TABLE t_account_bak ADD INDEX t_account_bak_amount(`amount`)
ALTER TABLE t_account ADD COLUMN status text AFTER amount

output.sql: ALTER TABLE `encrypt_ds`.t_account ADD COLUMN status text AFTER cipher_amount

input.sql: ALTER TABLE t_account MODIFY COLUMN status text AFTER amount

output.sql: ALTER TABLE `encrypt_ds`.t_account MODIFY COLUMN status text AFTER cipher_amount

input.sql: ALTER TABLE t_account ADD COLUMN amount INT

output.sql: ALTER TABLE `encrypt_ds`.t_account ADD COLUMN cipher_amount VARCHAR(4000)
